prompt: Open Safari, navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS, copy the first paragraph to the clipboard, then create a note titled 'KinBench Clipboard 363' containing that paragraph. Fast path: after the clipboard contains the paragraph, run cerebellum 'multi clipboard_to_note "KinBench Clipboard 363"' to drop the clipboard into a fresh note (composite handles pbpaste + notes create).
